LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EQUINOX PINE STREET, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE FACTS ARE UNDISPUTED THAT DEFENDANT CALLED EMERGENCY SERVICE AND DID NOT INCREASE THE DANGER TO PLAINTIFF. THE DECISIONS IN ROTOLO V SAN JOSE SPORTS & ENTERTAINMENT, L.L.C. (2007) 151 CAL APP 4TH 307 AND BREAUX V GINO'S, INC. (1984) 153 CAL APP 3D 379 HOLD THAT DEFENDANT DISCHARGED ITS DUTY OF CARE TO PLAINTIFF AND MAY NOT BE HELD LIABLE FOR USING THE A.E.D. DEVICE TO ASSIST PLAINTIFF. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
